summary: Iteration 23 - Email localization, Stripe webhook, and FAB Add Prospect flow verified. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend FAB '+' flow works correctly with step 0 choice screen.

email_localization.description: Email templates correctly localized for all 4 languages (fr, en, de, it)
templates_tested: Trial reminder email (7 days, 2 days, generic)
email_localization.locale_fallback: Unknown locales correctly fall back to English

fab_add_prospect_flow.description: FAB '+' button opens AddProspectSheet with choice between 'Import from contacts' and 'Manual entry'
fab_add_prospect_flow.step_1_contact_form: Clicking 'Manual entry' navigates to contact form with Full name, Phone, Email fields
fab_add_prospect_flow.step_2_project_form: Available after step 1 with project type, budget, delay fields

backend_api_tests: ✓ EMAIL_CONTENT dictionary has all 4 locales (fr, en, de, it)
✓ Trial reminder email works for all locales
✓ Trial expired email works for all locales
✓ Password reset email works for all locales
✓ Unknown locale falls back to English
✓ Stripe webhook endpoint responds with status ok
frontend_ui_tests: ✓ AddProspectSheet opens with step 0 choice screen
✓ 'Import from contacts' button found with data-testid='import-contacts-btn'
✓ Clicking 'Manual entry' navigates to contact form (step 1)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 23 have been verified. Email templates are fully localized for fr/en/de/it with proper fallback to English. Stripe webhook endpoint responds correctly. FAB '+' button opens AddProspectSheet with step 0 showing choice between 'Import from contacts' and 'Manual entry'. The data-testid attributes are correctly implemented: fab-add-prospect, import-contacts-btn, manual-entry-btn.
